Senior React Developer
Company: Netguru
Location: Remote (EU timezone)
Type: B2B, long-term

About Netguru:
Netguru is a leading software consultancy building digital products for scale-ups and enterprises across Europe and the US. We specialize in React/Node.js solutions for fintech, e-commerce, and SaaS clients.

We are looking for a Senior React Developer to work on a US-based SaaS platform for procurement automation serving Fortune 500 clients.

Requirements (must-have):
- 5+ years of frontend experience
- 3+ years of React (hooks, context API, functional components)
- TypeScript proficiency
- State management: Redux, Zustand, or Recoil
- REST API and GraphQL integration
- Jest and React Testing Library for unit tests
- Experience with performance optimization (lazy loading, memoization, code splitting)
- Node.js basics (scripts, simple API routes)

Nice to have:
- Next.js
- Storybook for component documentation
- Cypress or Playwright for E2E
- Webpack or Vite configuration
- Docker basics
- AWS familiarity
- Tailwind CSS or styled-components
- Agile / Scrum

What you will do:
- Build reusable React component libraries used across multiple product teams
- Implement complex data visualization dashboards with large dataset handling
- Optimize frontend performance — bundle size, rendering, lazy loading
- Write unit tests with Jest + RTL, E2E with Cypress
- Collaborate with a US-based product team (English daily)

Tech stack:
React 18, TypeScript, Redux Toolkit, GraphQL, Node.js, Jest, React Testing Library, Cypress, Storybook, Webpack, Tailwind CSS

We offer:
- 25 000 – 32 000 PLN/month B2B
- 100% remote, EU timezone
- US client, English-only communication
- Long-term project
